_doc: Persistent state for the Sophos -> Client Portal ticket router. Maps Sophos alert.id to the CP ticket created for it, and tracks reminder-email cadence so we don't open duplicate tickets or spam support@technijian.com. Updated by route_alerts.py every hour when run with --apply.

<sophos_alert_id>.ticket_id: <CP ticket id> or null if creation pending/failed
<sophos_alert_id>.resolved_at: ISO 8601 or null (set when alert no longer in API)
